name: TMDb Auto Import
description: Busca en biblioteca local y, si no existe, importa placeholder desde TMDb.
overview: Busqueda local + importacion automatica desde TMDb

versions.changelog: Native Jellyfin search now merges local results with TMDb virtual results, and imports TMDb items only when they are selected.
Native Jellyfin search interception for /Items with TMDb fallback import, plus short result cache to avoid repeated imports while typing.
Fix: avoid plugin malfunction on startup by removing early configuration dependency in service registration.
